about.title: About PT XERANET
about.subtitle: Get to know our journey, vision, mission, and the professional team behind our successful technology solutions.

story.title: Our Journey
story.p1: Founded with a vision to democratize access to high-quality technology, PT XERANET has grown from a local network service provider into a national-scale digital transformation partner.
story.p2: We believe that every business deserves robust IT infrastructure and reliable software. This commitment drives our team of engineers and developers to keep innovating every day.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To be the preferred technology partner empowering businesses across Indonesia through innovative, secure, and scalable IT solutions.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To provide high-quality IT consulting, construct resilient network infrastructure, develop user-centric software solutions, and offer top-notch after-sales support.

list.title: Company Foundation
list.desc: PT XERANET was established in Jakarta with a core team of 5 computer network engineers.

list.title: IT Services Expansion
list.desc: Launched custom software development division for web and mobile applications.

list.title: ISO 27001 Certification
list.desc: Successfully achieved international information security management standard certification.

list.title: National Scale Partnership
list.desc: Became the official IT partner for 3 retail and infrastructure conglomerate groups in Indonesia.

team.title: Our Leadership & Expert Team
team.subtitle: Backed by experienced and certified professionals in software development and network infrastructure.

points.p1_desc: Our team consists of industry-certified experts with rich field experience.
points.p2_desc: Every system we build is designed to grow along with your business.
points.p3_desc: Data protection and network integrity are our highest priorities.
points.p4_desc: Our customer service and maintenance teams are ready to help you whenever needed.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find quick answers to common questions about our services and work processes.
faq.q1: How long does a project take?
faq.a1: Depending on complexity. Landing page: 1–2 weeks. Simple mobile app: 1–2 months. Enterprise system: 3–6 months. We always provide a realistic estimate upfront.
faq.q2: Is there any fee for the initial consultation?
faq.a2: No. Our initial consultation is 100% free. We believe that understanding your needs first is an important step before providing a proposal.
faq.a3: Usually divided into milestone stages: Down Payment at the beginning, payments per development phase, and final settlement upon delivery. Transparent and flexible.
faq.q4: Is there support after the project is completed?
faq.a4: Yes. We provide bug fixes warranty and after-launch support. Long-term maintenance packages are also available as needed.
faq.a5: We use a modern stack: React Native & Flutter for mobile, Next.js & React for web, Laravel & Node.js for backend, and AWS/GCP for cloud infrastructure.
faq.q6: Can I request additional features in the middle of a project?
faq.a6: Yes. We use an agile approach, so changes and additions to features can be accommodated through mutual agreement regarding scope and timeline.
